scripts.check:image-workflow: npm -s run test --silent -- lib/editor/machines/image-workflow.machine.test.ts services/editor/server/filter-working-copy.test.ts services/editor/server/filter-chain.test.ts && npm -s run test:e2e:local:workflow && npm -s run verify:image-state-binding && npm -s run verify:filter-chain-binding && npm -s run verify:image-version-invariants
scripts.check:local: npm -s run lint && npm -s run test --silent && npm -s run check:db-schema && npm -s run check:bootstrap-migrations && npm -s run verify:rls
scripts.check:local:linked: npm -s run check:local && SUPABASE_VERIFY_TYPES_SYNC=1 npm -s run verify:types-synced
scripts.check:remote: npm -s run verify:image-state-binding && npm -s run verify:filter-chain-binding && npm -s run verify:image-version-invariants
scripts.check:ci: npm -s run check:local && npm -s run test:coverage:gate
scripts.types:gen: supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > lib/supabase/database.types.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ci:prepare: npm -s run build || (echo "[APP_BUILD] Build/typecheck failed before E2E." && exit 1)
scripts.test:e2e:ci:pr: npm -s run test:e2e:ci:prepare && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts --grep "smoke:" && node scripts/check-playwright-flaky.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:ci:nightly: npm -s run test:e2e:ci:prepare && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts --grep "smoke:|regression:" && node scripts/check-playwright-flaky.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:local:prepare: npm -s run build || (echo "[APP_BUILD] Build/typecheck failed before E2E." && exit 1)
scripts.test:e2e:local:smoke: npm -s run test:e2e:local:prepare && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts --grep "smoke:"
scripts.test:e2e:local:workflow: npm -s run test:e2e:local:prepare && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts --grep "smoke:|regression:"
scripts.test:e2e:local:workflow:reuse: PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts --grep "smoke:|regression:"
scripts.test:e2e:local:full: npm -s run test:e2e:local:prepare && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 node scripts/verify-playwright-env.mjs && PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_HOST_ARCH=arm64 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.playwright-browsers PLAYWRIGHT_USE_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEBSERVER_COMMAND='npm run start:e2e' PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3110 playwright test e2e/editor.boot.spec.ts
